New Structs
id params
6389(1) {'1078': 5, '1086': 'Volume', '1088': 'volume, audio, sound, loud, quiet'}
6390(1) {'1078': 5, '1086': 'Music Settings', '1088': 'music, audio, song, songs'}
6391(1) {'1078': 5, '1086': 'General Audio Settings', '1088': 'general, audio, sound'}
6392(1) {'1078': 5, '1086': 'Music Player', '1088': 'music, song, player, list, soundtrack, audio, sound, music interface, music panel, music sidepanel, music side-panel, music side panel'}
6393(1) {'1077': 477, '1078': 2, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Music mode', '1088': 'music, mode, songs, area, manual, random, single, shuffle', '1091': 2766, '1096': 'Determines which music mode to use. Area plays music relevant to the area you are currently in. Shuffle plays unlocked music tracks in a shuffled order (and if in a playlist, only selects tracks from that playlist). Single simply plays the current music track.'}
6394(1) {'1077': 478, '1078': 2, '1085': 1, '1086': 'Music playlist', '1088': 'music, playlist, songs', '1091': 2772, '1096': 'Determines which music playlist to use, if any.'}
6395(1) {'1077': 479, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1086': 'Default to area music mode on login', '1088': 'default, login, music, songs, area, mode', '1096': 'When enabled, your music mode will default to area mode on login. Otherwise the mode will be whichever was last used.'}
6396(1) {'1077': 480, '1078': 0, '1086': 'Play the default track when entering an area', '1088': 'default, area, mode, music, songs, track, entering', '1096': 'When enabled, the default music track will always play when first entering an area, before then randomly playing through the other tracks for that area. This setting is only relevant for areas that have multiple music tracks.'}
6397(1) {'1077': 481, '1078': 0, '1084': 1, '1086': 'Update music when changing playlists', '1088': 'update, music, changing, playlists, songs, track, mode', '1096': 'When enabled, changing playlists will automatically update your music track to one in that playlist. If needed, your music mode will also be updated.'}
6398(1) {'1077': 482, '1078': 2, '1086': 'Music mode to use when manually selecting music tracks', '1088': 'music, mode, songs, track, manual, random, single, shuffle', '1091': 2773, '1096': 'Determines which music mode to use when manually selecting music tracks. Note that the mode will only be changed if you're not already in a relevant mode.'}
6399(1) {'1077': 483, '1078': 2, '1086': 'Display music tracks', '1088': 'music, music list, music player, show, hide, locked, unlocked', '1091': 5274, '1096': 'Determines which music tracks are displayed in the music player.'}
6400(1) {'1077': 484, '1078': 0, '1086': 'Disable music player text shadows', '1088': 'music, music list, music player, text, shadow, outline, font, eyesight, vision, accessibility', '1096': 'Removes shadows from the text in your music player.'}
6401(1) {'1077': 485, '1078': 9, '1086': 'Locked music track text colour', '1088': 'music, music list, music player, text, color, colour, font, locked, colourblind, colorblind, blind, eyesight, vision, accessibility', '1096': 'Determines the text colour for locked music tracks in your music player.', '1230': 16711680}
6402(1) {'1077': 486, '1078': 9, '1086': 'Unlocked music track text colour', '1088': 'music, music list, music player, text, color, colour, font, unlocked, colourblind, colorblind, blind, eyesight, vision, accessibility', '1096': 'Determines the text colour for unlocked music tracks in your music player.', '1230': 901389}
6403(1) {'1077': 487, '1078': 9, '1086': 'Unavailable music track text colour', '1088': 'music, music list, music player, text, color, colour, font, unavailable, not available, colourblind, colorblind, blind, eyesight, vision, accessibility', '1096': 'Determines the text colour for unavailable music tracks in your music player.', '1230': 10461087}
6404(1) {'1077': 488, '1078': 6, '1086': 'Reset music player text colours', '1088': 'music, music list, music player, text, color, colour, font, reset, default, defaults, colourblind, colorblind, blind, eyesight, vision, accessibility', '1093': 2, '1100': 44}
6405(1) {'1077': 489, '1078': 6, '1086': 'Wipe custom music playlist 1', '1088': 'music, songs, reset, wipe, clear, empty, playlist, custom, 1, one'}
6406(1) {'1077': 490, '1078': 6, '1086': 'Wipe custom music playlist 2', '1088': 'music, songs, reset, wipe, clear, empty, playlist, custom, 2, two'}
6407(1) {'1077': 491, '1078': 6, '1086': 'Wipe custom music playlist 3', '1088': 'music, songs, reset, wipe, clear, empty, playlist, custom, 3, three'}

2974(1)
params {'1077': 110, '1078': 2, '1086': 'Music area mode', '1088': 'Music area mode, music, song, songs, area, playlist, shuffle, audio', '1091': 684, '1096': 'Determines which music area mode to use . Modern uses large areas with multiple music tracks assigned to each area. Classic uses small areas with one music track per area.'} {'1077': 110, '1078': 2, '1086': 'Music area type', '1088': 'Music area mode, music, song, songs, area, playlist, shuffle, audio', '1091': 684, '1096': 'Determines which type of music area to use when using area music mode. Modern areas primarily follow natural boundaries, whereas classic areas are mostly square. Modern areas are also typically larger and often have multiple music tracks assigned to them, whereas classic areas mostly only have one music track per area.'}
4503(1)
